notes: Large genuine dataset. Should produce high confidence positive verdict with mixed notes on nipple flow.

reviews.text: Love this bottle! My baby took to it instantly after we switched from breastfeeding. The wide neck makes it so easy to clean and the anti-colic valve really works.
Best bottle I've tried for my newborn. Easy to assemble and dishwasher safe which is a lifesaver.
My baby had terrible gas before we switched to Avent. Within a few days the colic improved dramatically.
Wide neck is genius. I can actually get my hand in to clean it properly unlike other bottles.
Great bottle overall. My 3 month old loves it. Only slight issue is the flow is a bit fast but manageable.
Switched from another brand and honestly wish I had done it sooner. Baby feeds so much more calmly now.
Good quality bottle. Sterilises well and hasn't discoloured after months of use.
The anti-colic system genuinely works. My son went from crying after every feed to being totally calm.
Easy to clean, easy to use, baby accepts it well. What more do you want from a bottle.
Nipple flow is too fast for my newborn. She keeps choking and milk spills everywhere. Good bottle otherwise.
Absolutely worth the price. Have bought 6 of these now. They last well and baby loves them.
My 2 week old struggles with the flow. Too much milk comes out too fast for such a young baby.
Perfect for our breastfed baby. She switches between breast and bottle with no confusion at all.
Dishwasher safe and still looks new after 4 months. Really durable.
The wide neck design makes filling and cleaning so much easier than narrow neck bottles.
Baby had colic for weeks. Switched to Avent and within a week the difference was night and day.
Good bottle but the teat flow is definitely too fast for newborns under 6 weeks. Fine after that.
We have tried 5 different bottles. This is the only one our fussy baby will take.
Washes perfectly in the dishwasher, no residue at all even after formula feeds.
Leaked a little at first but once I tightened the ring properly it was fine. Good bottle.
My baby had terrible gas and reflux. This bottle with the anti-colic valve reduced both significantly.
Very easy to clean. Wide neck means no bottle brush needed, my hand fits right in.
Flow is way too fast for my 3 week old. She chokes every single feed. Returning it.
Great quality, BPA free, easy to sterilise. Baby accepted it from day one.
The natural shaped teat makes the transition from breast to bottle seamless.
Really good bottle. Has helped with my son's wind issues. Easy to put together too.
Not cheap but worth every dirham. Quality is excellent and it lasts.
My baby's colic improved within days of switching to this bottle. Highly recommend.
Easy to clean is an understatement. Takes me 30 seconds to wash. Love it.
Solid bottle. Nothing fancy but does the job well. Baby happy, mum happy.
The anti-colic valve is a game changer. My baby barely gets gas now compared to before.
Tried cheaper brands first and regretted it. Avent is worth the price difference.
Flow is fine for my 4 month old but I can see it being too fast for a newborn.
Bought 4 of these. All consistent quality. No leaking, easy cleaning, baby loves them.
Does exactly what it says. Anti-colic works, easy to clean, baby accepts it well.
My son rejected every other bottle. This one he took immediately. Worth every penny.
Good bottle but a bit pricey compared to local brands. Quality is noticeably better though.
The wide neck makes it so practical. Easy to fill, easy to clean, no fuss.
Brilliant for reducing wind. My baby used to scream after feeds. Not anymore.
Nipple flow too fast for newborns, that is my only complaint. Otherwise excellent bottle.
رضّاعة ممتازة، طفلي تقبّلها من أول استخدام وما فيها مغص أبداً. سهلة التنظيف جداً.
أفضل رضّاعة جربتها. الرقبة الواسعة تسهّل التنظيف والتعقيم. ما راح أرجع لغيرها.
طفلتي كان عندها مغص شديد وبعد ما حوّلتها على هالرضّاعة تحسّن الوضع كثير.
جيدة بس تدفق الحليب سريع شوي للمواليد الصغار. ما تناسب أقل من شهرين.
سهلة التنظيف وتدخل في غسالة الأطباق بدون مشاكل. الجودة ممتازة.
رضّاعة رائعة، الطفل ما يرفض التحويل بينها وبين الرضاعة الطبيعية وهذا مهم جداً.
الحجم مناسب والشكل مريح للطفل. ما لاحظت أي تسريب. راضية عنها.
غالية شوي بس تستاهل. الجودة واضحة والطفل يحبها.
استخدمتها لطفلين وما خذلتني. متينة وسهلة التنظيف وما تتلوّن مع الوقت.
الصمام المضاد للمغص يشتغل فعلاً. طفلي أهدى بكثير بعد ما بدأت أستخدمها.
تدفق الحليب قوي جداً لمولودتي الجديدة، اختنقت أكثر من مرة. مو مناسبة للرضع الصغار.
